title: pelargonium × acutangulum
intro: Pelargonium × acutangulum, also known as Mountain Rose or Acute-leaved Geranium, is a perennial plant in the family Geraniaceae that is native to South Africa. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of geraniol and linalool in its essential oil. The health benefits of Pelargonium × acutangulum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tinctures, and essential oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
